violations.description: Demonstration of knowledge by person in charge. — --Person in charge did not demonstrate adequate knowledge of the food service code requirements.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloth at prep table upon arrival. *Facility had been doing prep work since 8 am and did not have a sani bucket made/ready to use.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling of potentially hazardous food was not accomplished using proper methods. -Cook stated items are left out at room temperature to cool to touch and then placed into walk in cooler to finish cooling. No times or temperatures known for existing process of cooling products. *Left cooling log on-site with cook.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Multiple items in pizza table are not date marked. -Two foil pans of meat in walk in cooler are not date marked.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of. -Facility is vacuum sealing meats that are batch smoked/cooked on-site. Using this method to prep ahead for summer service and to use "boil in a bag" method of reheat. *Directed to dispose of vacuum sealed items in walk in cooler. DOH left direction to break seal on remaining vacuum sealed items when removed from walk in freezer and thawed in walk in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Food debris at pizza table upper interior lid. -Debris/corn meal at utility cart in pizza room. -Residue at exterior surfaces of microwave. -Moisture/debris at underside of hot table cutting board.

Prep/vegetable sink. — --Designated prep sink was not provided or not used for food items requiring washing/soaking. -Prep sink in pizza prep room is unavailable since water to sink is turned off/not working.
